evals.prompt: Our orders list API is taking 2 seconds to respond. The query joins orders with users and order_items, filters by status='active' and date range, and sorts by created_at DESC. Help optimize.
evals.expected_output: EXPLAIN ANALYZE, index recommendations, query rewrite suggestions, connection pooling check

assertions.name: explain_analyze
assertions.description: Runs or recommends EXPLAIN ANALYZE on the slow query

assertions.name: index_recommendations
assertions.description: Suggests indexes on status, created_at, and join columns

assertions.name: query_optimization
assertions.description: Recommends query improvements (covering index, partial index, limit)

assertions.name: connection_pooling
assertions.description: Checks if connection pooling is configured

assertions.name: before_after
assertions.description: Shows expected improvement from each optimization

evals.prompt: Detect and fix N+1 query problems in our NestJS API that lists users with their projects. Currently it runs 1 query for users + N queries for each user's projects.
evals.expected_output: N+1 detection via query logging, fix using eager loading or JOIN, verification

assertions.name: detects_n_plus_1
assertions.description: Identifies the N+1 pattern from query log or code inspection

assertions.name: eager_loading_fix
assertions.description: Recommends include/join/eager loading to resolve

assertions.name: before_after_queries
assertions.description: Shows query count before (N+1) and after (1-2 queries)

assertions.name: orm_specific
assertions.description: Fix uses ORM-appropriate syntax (Prisma include, TypeORM relations, Django prefetch_related)

assertions.name: verification
assertions.description: Shows how to verify the fix (query count assertion in tests)

evals.prompt: Our PostgreSQL database is 50GB and growing. Some tables have millions of rows. Recommend indexing strategy, partitioning, and archival for the orders and events tables.
evals.expected_output: Indexing strategy, table partitioning plan, and data archival approach

assertions.name: index_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends indexes based on query patterns

assertions.name: partitioning
assertions.description: Suggests range partitioning on created_at for large tables

assertions.name: archival_strategy
assertions.description: Plan for archiving old data (separate table, S3, or delete)

assertions.name: monitoring
assertions.description: Recommends pg_stat_user_tables for monitoring table growth

assertions.name: migration_plan
assertions.description: How to implement changes without downtime

evals.prompt: Add Redis caching to our NestJS API for the product listing endpoint. Products rarely change (updated a few times per day). Need cache invalidation when products are updated.
evals.expected_output: Redis cache layer with TTL, invalidation on update, and cache-aside pattern

assertions.name: cache_aside_pattern
assertions.description: Implements cache-aside (check cache → miss → query DB → populate cache)

assertions.name: ttl_configuration
assertions.description: Cache TTL set appropriately for products that update a few times daily

assertions.name: invalidation
assertions.description: Cache invalidated when products are created/updated/deleted

assertions.name: redis_client
assertions.description: Redis client properly configured with connection handling

assertions.name: cache_key_design
assertions.description: Cache keys designed for targeted invalidation (not flush-all)

evals.prompt: Optimize a Django ORM query that's doing a full table scan on 2 million user records. The query: User.objects.filter(is_active=True, last_login__gte=thirty_days_ago).order_by('-last_login')[:100]
evals.expected_output: Index recommendations, query analysis, and potential for covering index

assertions.name: partial_index
assertions.description: Recommends partial index on last_login WHERE is_active=true

assertions.name: composite_index
assertions.description: Suggests composite index on (is_active, last_login DESC)

assertions.name: explain_analysis
assertions.description: Uses EXPLAIN to verify index usage

assertions.name: pagination_warning
assertions.description: Notes that OFFSET pagination on large tables is slow, suggests keyset

assertions.name: migration_for_index
assertions.description: Shows Django migration to add the index
